name: PATENT_COUNT_BY_ASSIGNEE_AND_ORIGIN
description: Count patents for an assignee constrained by assignee origin/country.
cypher: MATCH (a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent) MATCH (a)-[:ORIGIN_FROM]->(o:Origin) WHERE toLower(a.name) = toLower($assignee) AND toLower(o.name) = toLower($origin) RETURN a.name AS assignee, o.name AS origin, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count LIMIT 1;
